title: Give your input on Mossel Bay IDP, budget in September
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality is in the process of reviewing its integrated development plan (IDP) and municipal budget for the 2026/27 financial year.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality is in the process of reviewing its integrated development plan (IDP) and municipal budget for the 2026/27 financial year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The municipality invites all community structures or organisations, interest groups and community members to participate and give input into the 2026/27 Draft IDP and Budget Review.","html":"The municipality invites all community structures or organisations, interest groups and community members to participate and give input into the 2026/27 Draft IDP and Budget Review."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“The IDP is a five-year strategic document that guides all development and service delivery decisions within the municipality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“It reflects the Council’s goals and priorities and is reviewed annually to ensure it remains aligned with the changing needs of the community,” said the municipality.","html":"“It reflects the Council’s goals and priorities and is reviewed annually to ensure it remains aligned with the changing needs of the community,” said the municipality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Residents can provide oral or written inputs at the venues below on the dates provided.","html":"Residents can provide oral or written inputs at the venues below on the dates provided."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“These meetings offer residents the opportunity to comment on proposed development projects and to identify priorities for their wards. Visual presentations of ward-specific projects will be displayed,” the municipality said.","html":"“These meetings offer residents the opportunity to comment on proposed development projects and to identify priorities for their wards. Visual presentations of ward-specific projects will be displayed,” the municipality said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Representatives from the municipality will be on-site to provide support if needed.","html":"Representatives from the municipality will be on-site to provide support if needed."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Community survey forms will be made available and can be collected at and submitted to all municipal offices and public libraries, as well as local spaza shops.","html":"Community survey forms will be made available and can be collected at and submitted to all municipal offices and public libraries, as well as local spaza shops."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Individuals who cannot read or write will receive assistance from municipal employees.","html":"Individuals who cannot read or write will receive assistance from municipal employees."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Additional written comments and inputs can be forwarded to [email protected] (IDP-related) or [email protected] (budget-related), posted to Private Bag X29, Mossel Bay, 6500, or hand-delivered to 101 Marsh Street, Mossel Bay, 6500 (security booth).","html":"Additional written comments and inputs can be forwarded to [email protected] (IDP-related) or [email protected] (budget-related), posted to Private Bag X29, Mossel Bay, 6500, or hand-delivered to 101 Marsh Street, Mossel Bay, 6500 (security booth)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The closing date for comments or input is 30 September at 16:00.","html":"The closing date for comments or input is 30 September at 16:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Meetings for in-person comments or input (17:00 and 19:00):","html":"Meetings for in-person comments or input (17:00 and 19:00):"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Ward 1 (Sibabalo Dubula): 2 September, KwaNonqaba Community Hall• Ward 2 (Noxolo Gwaza): 8 September, Thusong Centre Library• Ward 3 (Zithulele Matyesini): 4 September, Thusong Centre Library• Ward 4 (Annatjie Janse van Rensburg): Took place on Monday, 1 September, Reebok Community Hall• Ward 5 (Anton Dellemijn): 3 September, Great Brak River Council Chamber• Ward 6 (Mark Furness): 4 September, Voortrekker Hall• Ward 7 (Stephan Botha): 9 September, Brandwag Community Hall | 10 September, Denneprag School Hall | 16 September, St John’s Anglican Church Hall - Herbertsdale | 17 September, Sonskynvallei Community Hall• Ward 8 (Lodewyk Coetzee): 3 September, Mossel Bay Town Hall• Ward 9 (Luhein Prins): 16 September, D’Almeida Community Hall | 17 September, Lutheran Church Hall• Ward 10 (Leon van Dyk): 15 September, Hartenbos Municipal Offices• Ward 11 (Nickey le Roux): 1 September, Boggomsbaai Community Hall | 11 September, Dana Bay Community Hall• Ward 12 (Witness Buda): 11 September, Joe Slovo Community Hall | 17 September, Hillcrest Secondary School• Ward 13 (Rosina Ruiters): 2 September, Indoor Sport Centre | 8 September, Holy Nativity Church• Ward 14 (Donovan Claassen): 9 September, Greenhaven Community Hall | 11 September, Friemersheim Community Hall• Ward 15 (Mzwandile Mkonto): 10 September, Asla Community Hall.","html":"• Ward 1 (Sibabalo Dubula): 2 September, KwaNonqaba Community Hall
• Ward 2 (Noxolo Gwaza): 8 September, Thusong Centre Library
• Ward 3 (Zithulele Matyesini): 4 September, Thusong Centre Library
• Ward 4 (Annatjie Janse van Rensburg): Took place on Monday, 1 September, Reebok Community Hall
• Ward 5 (Anton Dellemijn): 3 September, Great Brak River Council Chamber
• Ward 6 (Mark Furness): 4 September, Voortrekker Hall
• Ward 7 (Stephan Botha): 9 September, Brandwag Community Hall | 10 September, Denneprag School Hall | 16 September, St John’s Anglican Church Hall - Herbertsdale | 17 September, Sonskynvallei Community Hall
• Ward 8 (Lodewyk Coetzee): 3 September, Mossel Bay Town Hall
• Ward 9 (Luhein Prins): 16 September, D’Almeida Community Hall | 17 September, Lutheran Church Hall
• Ward 10 (Leon van Dyk): 15 September, Hartenbos Municipal Offices
• Ward 11 (Nickey le Roux): 1 September, Boggomsbaai Community Hall | 11 September, Dana Bay Community Hall
• Ward 12 (Witness Buda): 11 September, Joe Slovo Community Hall | 17 September, Hillcrest Secondary School
• Ward 13 (Rosina Ruiters): 2 September, Indoor Sport Centre | 8 September, Holy Nativity Church
• Ward 14 (Donovan Claassen): 9 September, Greenhaven Community Hall | 11 September, Friemersheim Community Hall
• Ward 15 (Mzwandile Mkonto): 10 September, Asla Community Hall."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information on the IDP, call 044 606 5096 or send an email to [email protected], and for information on the budget, call 044 606 5154 or email [email protected].","html":"For more information on the IDP, call 044 606 5096 or send an email to [email protected], and for information on the budget, call 044 606 5154 or email [email protected]."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The municipality said changes to the schedule may occur due to unforeseen circumstances, but will be communicated in reasonable time.","html":"The municipality said changes to the schedule may occur due to unforeseen circumstances, but will be communicated in reasonable time."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Give your input on Mossel Bay IDP, budget in September
